title: Smoked Pork Skillet
description: A savory chinese-inspired dish featuring smoked pork and a rich, flavorful sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced onions and cook until caramelized, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the smoked pork and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Add the jamaican jerk seasoning and stir to combine.
5. Add the pork broth and stir to combine. Bring to a simmer.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook for 10-15 minutes or until the pork is cooked through.
7. Serve the pork and onions over rice, garnished with sliced green onions and a drizzle of hoisin sauce.
8. Optional: Add a splash of soy sauce and rice vinegar for added flavor.
